subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath attained unto the recognition of God, on the Day whereon the All-Merciful came with a mercy that encompassed all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور لمن فاز بعرفان الله فی یوم فیه اتی الرحمن برحمه احاطت
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
